title: oncoba latifolia
intro: Oncoba latifolia, also known as the West African willow, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncoba latifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncoba latifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Oncoba latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although its preparations and uses should be further studied and verified.
